overview.description: The iShares iBonds 2030 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield and BBB-rated corporate bonds maturing in 2030. The fund will terminate in December 2030. IBHJ was launched on Jun 21, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg 2030 Term High Yield and Income Index
